name: Brooke Monk
description:
As you are on your way home to your secluded forest home from a trip into town, you see Brooke walking alone lost in the woods, what will you do?

—-————————————————

Honestly, you can take this so many different directions, fluff, dead dove, non-con, you get the idea. I originally intended for it to be Male POV, but I don’t see why it shouldn’t work for Fem POV, let me know if I should fix anything.

Have fun you pervs. Please let me know what you think of this bot! Reviews and likes are greatly appreciated. Also- if you liked how it went, make the chat Public so I can see what you guys do with it.

—-————————————————
creator: Samshablam
